title: Festive Fluffy Algerian Dumplings
description: Delicate and light dumplings, served with a side of savory Algerian spices, perfect for a festive occasion.
instructions: Combine flour and yeast in a large mixing bowl.
Gradually add water while mixing until dough forms.
Knead dough for 10 minutes until smooth.
Roll out each piece into a thin circle.
Place a tablespoon of algerian spices in the center of each circle.
Fold dough over to form a half moon shape and press edges together.
Heat a large skillet over medium heat and cook dumplings for 3-4 minutes on each side.
Serve hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
